resources.string: Set background image for character chat page
Extract Material You colors from background or avatar
Darken in dark mode, lighten in light mode
Set default chat model for character. If not set, global default will be used.
Controls how many history messages are sent as context. Messages beyond this limit are ignored to save tokens.
Are you sure you want to delete this character? This cannot be undone.
Use QuickJS engine to execute JavaScript code for calculations and scripting
Execute Python code with pip packages and file I/O. Supports numpy and Pillow.
Allow Python code to make network requests
Max generation tokens. Leave empty for no limit.
When enabled, the model will try to remember information from your conversation for future use. Requires tool support.
Controls message format sent to LLM. Usually doesn\'t need modification.
When enabled, character will reference recent chat history for better context
Define regex patterns to transform messages before sending/receiving
Visual Only (Only affects display, not actual message)
Don\'t modify this unless you know what you are doing
Use character avatar and name in chat instead of model\'s
App needs restart to apply settings.
Please chat first before editing title
For Global Users, get Discord Role
Generated by AI, may contain inaccuracies.
Select aspect ratio for generated image
Are you sure you want to cancel generation?
Select AI model for image generation
Describe the image you want to generate...
No AI providers available, please add in settings
Camera permission required to take photos
Some permissions permanently denied, please enable in settings:
Use pure black background in dark mode
Automatically collapse thinking content when done
Show model icon in chat list
Automatically collapse code blocks by default
Wrap long lines in code blocks
Create a new conversation when app starts
Show more debug features. Not recommended for normal users.
Enable haptic feedback during message generation
Show notification when message generation completes in background
Show quick jump button when scrolling chat
Show model name in chat messages
Show token statistics below AI responses
Show user avatar in chat messages
Show chat bubbles around character messages
Skip crop screen after picking image
Add custom HTTP headers for MCP server requests
Tools list unavailable during creation. Please view after adding.
Model for generating chat suggestions. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Model for summarizing chat titles. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Select built-in tools supported by model. Currently only for Gemini official API.
You haven\'t configured API and models yet.
View user manual and help docs
Support the author if you like this app
LastChat - Open Source AI Assistant\n\nWebsite: https://rikka-ai.com/
Click button below to add models
Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This cannot be undone.
Couldn\'t fetch models from the API. Try adding an API key!
Couldn\'t fetch any models from the API. Maybe this provider doesn\'t support model fetching. You can add models manually though!
Configure custom provider settings for this model. Inherits common properties from parent.
Response API is OpenAI\'s new API. Most providers don\'t support it. Keep off if unsure.
It looks like you don\'t have this provider in your list. Don\'t worry, we have a preset ready for you!
Hello, this is a text-to-speech test.
Quick access to chat with a character
* SiliconFlow free models built-in. No API Key needed. For more powerful models, please use your own API Key.
Tools are disabled for current model. Please enable tools in settings to use Search/MCP.
Model for text embeddings (e.g. for memory).
Your character won\'t remember this chat and you won\'t be able to access it once you close it.
Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This cannot be undone.
Custom prompts that can be toggled on/off
Define custom prompts that can be toggled on/off per chat. Higher priority modes are injected first.
Add modes to inject custom prompts
Create organized collections of prompts that activate based on keywords or semantic similarity.
Add lorebooks to inject context-aware prompts
Tap to select an image or emoji
Add entries to inject prompts when triggered
Select which lorebooks to use with this character
Create lorebooks in Settings → Prompt Injections → Lorebooks
Select which lorebooks to use with this assistant
Limit messages sent to model (0 = unlimited)
Generate summaries of pruned messages to preserve context
Ask a question about this text…
Select text anywhere on your device, look for \"LastChat\" in the toolbar that appears, and tap it to use these features.

This is sample text you can select! Try long-pressing to select these words, then look for \"LastChat\" in the selection toolbar. If you don\'t see it, you may need to tap the overflow menu (⋮) to find it.
👆 Long-press the text above to try selecting it
Style shown at top of empty chat
How the message input bar looks
This feature is currently under development
No diaries yet. Start chatting and generate one!
Are you sure you want to delete this diary entry?
No chat records found for today
All memories sent to model in every conversation
Adds titles and timestamps of recent conversations
Smart memory retrieval based on conversation context
Forms episodic memories with automatic consolidation
Optimization completed: %1$d entries merged/updated, %2$d redundant fragments deleted, and %3$d new memories added.
Model used for deep memory optimization and long-term consolidation.
Wait time after a chat ends before forming memories
Test RAG retrieval to see which memories are returned
Select a summarizer model in the Models tab
Automatically summarize when history limit is reached
Number of messages before auto-summarization triggers (retains last 4 messages)
Number of recent segment summaries to include as historical background
Select a summarizer model in the Models tab
Show summarize button in chat input
Compress the conversation into a summary to free up context space
Configure a summarizer model in settings first
This will summarize your conversation history into a compact form. The AI will remember the key points but detailed messages will be replaced with a summary.
Model used for context refresh and message summarization.
Use model\'s native search when available
Display character avatar in the new chat header
Show the character\'s avatar before messages
Show rounded chat bubbles for assistant messages
Show context sources (modes, memories, lorebooks) in message toolbar
Character can message you without prompting
Customize fonts for headers, content, and code
Chat display, haptics, code blocks, font size and more
Automatically check GitHub for new app versions
Custom text styling for roleplay patterns
Use same font for headers and content
Link header and content font settings together
Code, inline code, and monospace text
This will reset all font settings to their defaults. Custom fonts will be kept but no longer applied.
This will reset the font settings for %s to defaults.
Enable tactile feedback when tapping buttons and controls
Define custom color rules for markdown elements. Add rules with patterns below to change their text color.
No rules yet. Tap + to add one.
Skip: Text matching the pattern will be skipped.\nOnly Read: Only text matching the pattern will be read.
No rules yet. Tap + to add one.
Text wrapped like %1$stext%2$s will be filtered
Only text inside %1$s...%2$s will be read
Are you sure you want to restore default actions? This will replace all your custom actions.
Periodically summarize conversations into episodic memories
Maintain a global overview of the relationship and goals
Instructions for the AI to maintain the archive. Leave blank for default.
Number of recent messages to include in context
Summarize older messages to save context space
Allow character to remember past interactions using RAG
Use semantic search to find relevant memories
Maximum number of relevant memories to retrieve for each conversation.
Completed: %1$d success, %2$d failed. Check your settings.
He/She don\'t feel like writing a diary right now.
Automatically back up via WebDAV when the app is launched for the first time each day.
Data has been successfully synced to WebDAV server
An error occurred in the background backup task, retry will be attempted later
Allow the agent to read and write your schedule. When enabled, it can view your today\'s arrangements and assist you in creating new schedules.
Manage your daily tasks and goals
Configure QQ Mail to enable sending and receiving emails
Allow the AI assistant to send and receive emails via your QQ Mail
Connected successfully! Sending and receiving functions are working properly.

How to get the authorization code?
1. Log in to the PC version of QQ Mail
2. Go to Settings > Account
3. Find and enable POP3/IMAP/SMTP service
4. Click "Generate Authorization Code"
Allow AI to send and receive emails
No email account or authorization code detected. The email tool will not work. Tap to configure.
Are you sure you want to cancel and delete this scheduled task?
Allow the assistant to set scheduled tasks (such as sending emails and keeping diaries).

Determines which content is retained first when context space (tokens) is insufficient. Prioritizing chat history preserves more conversation details, while prioritizing memory fragments retains more retrieved background knowledge.
Updating the memory profile may cause old content to be lost due to AI generation anomalies. It is recommended to back up the current content to the clipboard first. Do you want to continue?
Let the agent perceive the current time and response intervals to help enhance the realism of the conversation.
This message contains tool calls or multiple steps. Regenerating will replace the entire response and cannot be restored to the previous version. Are you sure you want to continue?
How the assistant searches for relevant memories.
Combines keyword and semantic search for optimal results.
Fast, offline matching using local text analysis.
Uses AI embeddings to understand context and meaning.
